episodes.title: RHOBH S15E0: Cult Following
episodes.description:
The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills explores Amanda’s journey into and out of a Florida cult while the Hamptons crew parties in Montauk. Then, Denise returns to the show for a sobering scene with Erika and Sutton. To watch this recap on video, listen to our bonus episodes, and get ad free listening,, go to Patreon.com/watchwhatcrappens.
